name: Eagle Beach
description: Repeatedly ranked among the best beaches in the Caribbean and top beaches worldwide on TripAdvisor. Iconic wind-bent fofoti (divi-divi) trees line the shore — one of Aruba's most photographed scenes.

rockiness.beach: Fine white coral sand — wide and powdery, great for sand castles 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Mostly sand; very gradual slope, no reef at shore

characteristics.depth_profile: Very gradual sandy slope — waist-deep for a long distance on calm days. No significant reef at this beach; depth stays shallow (under 1.5 m) for tens of meters before slow deepening.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Minimal — predominantly fine white sand; occasional small shells
characteristics.crowds: moderate; busier near Palm Beach end, quieter toward Manchebo
characteristics.access: Free parking lots along the coast road; taxi and bus accessible
characteristics.facilities: Palapas, nearby beach bars and restaurants at adjacent resorts (public beach access)
fun_facts: Repeatedly ranked among the best beaches in the Caribbean and top beaches worldwide on TripAdvisor.
Iconic wind-bent fofoti (divi-divi) trees line the shore — one of Aruba's most photographed scenes.
Important sea turtle nesting site (roughly May–November); nests may be marked with tape — do not disturb.
